results.title: Dalton: Cyclist to share stories from Cuba adventure
results.description: Laurie Martinelli will share her stories and photos from a two-week trip cycling through Cuba at 1 p.m. Wednesday, July 22, at the Dalton Senior Center.

results.title: Spalletti: “We know what we can do, now we need to step it up”
results.description: On the eve of the first pre-season friendly against FC Basel, Luciano Spalletti met with journalists to take stock of the start of pre-season training and the Juventus Men's First Team's prospects for...

results.title: Skipper Dewi Lake backs Wales' driving maul to challenge Springboks
results.description: Captain Dewi Lake insists the Welsh pack can cause South Africa major problems in Durban, provided they fix the physical flaws exposed in San Juan.

results.title: R&A honours golf star whose run of consecutive majors started at Royal Lytham & St Annes
results.description: Royal Lytham & St Annes started a run of major appearances for the first R&A Spirit of Golf Award winner

results.title: 5 second-half storylines to watch as the Pirates vie for a playoff spot
results.description: The Pirates are 50-47, over .500 at the All-Star break for the first time in a decade and sitting two games back of the Miami Marlins for the final National League wild card spot.
